title: Design a Mind Map of a Complex Research Project
scenario: Create a mind map that showcases the structure and organization of a complex research project. The mind map should include the different topics, their connections, and a legend to explain the color coding. Include a brief description of the project's goals and objectives.
constraints: Must have a maximum file size of 500KB

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the mind map adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the mind map easy to understand and navigate?
Does the mind map accurately represent the research project's structure and organization?
Does the mind map meet the specified file size constraint?
